narrative:
West Jefferson (precinct in Mercer County) has 851 registered voters, with 51.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.3 percentage points.
